storage.name: BigQuery
storage.pde_snippet: Separation of storage/compute is core. Partitioning (date/int) and Clustering (sorting) are mandatory for cost/perf. BigLake queries GCS/S3 data without movement.
storage.best_for: Petabyte-scale analytics, BQML, Analytics Hub, Omni (Multi-cloud).

details.cost: On-demand ($6.25/TB) or Capacity-based. Storage: Active vs. Long-term (50% cheaper if idle > 90 days).
details.availability: 99.99% SLA. Multi-regional for durability. Regional for compliance.
details.trouble: quotaExceeded (Project limits) or rateLimitExceeded (DML frequency).

storage.name: Cloud Storage
storage.pde_snippet: Classes: Standard, Nearline, Coldline, Archive. Use Lifecycle Management. Signed URLs for temp access. Naming randomness (sharding) aids throughput.
storage.best_for: Data lakes, static assets, staging for BigQuery.

details.cost: Storage Class ($/GB) + Operations + Egress. Archive retrieval is expensive.
details.trouble: 403 Forbidden: Check ACLs vs IAM; Uniform Bucket-Level Access recommended.

storage.name: Cloud Bigtable
storage.pde_snippet: HBase compatible. Sub-10ms latency. No joins. Hotspotting is the enemy—avoid sequential row keys. NOT for small data (<300GB).

details.cost: Hourly per node + Storage (SSD/HDD). Data Boost for serverless processing.
details.coding: Heavy-code: HBase API, Client Libraries. No native SQL.
details.availability: Up to 99.999% with multi-cluster routing. Eventual consistency by default.
details.trouble: Hotspotting: Check Key Visualizer for high CPU on single nodes; use salting.

storage.name: Cloud Spanner
storage.pde_snippet: 99.999% SLA. Global ACID. External consistency. Use Interleaving to physically co-locate child tables. High cost, high consistency.
storage.best_for: Global banking, supply chain, massive SQL workloads.

details.cost: Nodes/Processing Units + Storage. Higher baseline cost than Cloud SQL.
details.coding: Low-code (SQL). Standard SQL or PostgreSQL-compatible interface.
details.trouble: High Latency: Check for large transactions or missing secondary indexes.

storage.name: Cloud SQL
storage.pde_snippet: MySQL, Postgres, SQL Server. Managed backups, HA, and read replicas. Limited horizontal write scale compared to Spanner.

details.trouble: Storage Full: Enable automatic storage increase. Use Cloud SQL Auth Proxy.

storage.name: AlloyDB
storage.pde_snippet: GCP-native Postgres with decoupled storage. 100x faster reads than standard Postgres. Columnar engine for HTAP.

details.trouble: Cache Misses: Ensure workload fits within allocated memory.

storage.name: Firestore
storage.pde_snippet: Strong consistency. Real-time sync for mobile. Successor to Datastore. Scales to millions of users.
storage.best_for: Mobile backends, user profiles, live catalogs.

details.trouble: Index errors: Complex queries require manual composite indexes.

storage.name: Memorystore
storage.pde_snippet: Redis and Memcached. Sub-millisecond latency. Ephemeral—use for caching, not as primary DB without persistence.

details.trouble: Eviction: Check Maxmemory policy if data is disappearing too fast.

processing.name: Dataflow
processing.pde_snippet: Apache Beam. Unified processing. Exactly-once. Handles Late Data using Watermarks, Windowing (Fixed, Sliding, Session), and Triggers.
processing.best_for: Real-time ETL, complex windowing, streaming analytics.

details.cost: vCPU + Memory + Data Processed. Shuffle/Streaming engine adds efficiency but costs.
details.trouble: Hot Keys: Data skew on one key causes lag. Use Combine.perKey.

processing.name: Dataproc
processing.pde_snippet: Migrate on-prem Hadoop/Spark. Use Ephemeral clusters to save costs. Preemptible/Spot VMs for workers save ~80% cost. Dataproc Serverless avail.

details.cost: $0.01 per vCPU/hr fee + GCE costs. Use Spot VMs for savings.
details.trouble: YARN Memory: Too many parallel tasks for executor size. Increase memory.

processing.name: Data Fusion
processing.pde_snippet: Based on CDAP. Drag-and-drop pipeline builder. High cost but low code. Best for legacy enterprise integration patterns.

details.cost: Monthly instance fee + Dataflow execution costs.
details.trouble: Execution Latency: Check underlying Dataflow logs for performance bottlenecks.

processing.name: Dataprep
processing.pde_snippet: Trifacta-based. Visual tool for cleaning data. Generates Dataflow code under the hood. Perfect for analysts to explore datasets.
processing.best_for: Visual data cleaning, exploratory data analysis.

details.trouble: Sampling limits: Large files may be sampled for display; full runs happen on Dataflow.

processing.name: Datastream
processing.pde_snippet: Serverless Change Data Capture (CDC). Replicates Oracle/MySQL/Postgres to BigQuery or GCS in real-time with minimal latency.

details.trouble: Permission errors: Source DB needs log-level access for CDC.

processing.name: Dataform
processing.pde_snippet: SQL-based modeling in BigQuery. Version control for SQL. Builds table dependencies and documentation. Successor to manual views.

details.trouble: Compilation errors: Check SQLX syntax in the IDE.

orchestration.name: Pub/Sub
orchestration.pde_snippet: Global asynchronous messaging. Decouples publishers/subscribers. At-least-once delivery guaranteed. Exactly-once with Dataflow.

details.trouble: DEADLINE_EXCEEDED: Subscriber not acking fast enough; increase ackDeadline.

orchestration.name: Managed Kafka
orchestration.pde_snippet: Apache Kafka compatible service. Best for teams migrating existing Kafka workloads without rewriting code for Pub/Sub.

details.trouble: Consumer Lag: Check if number of consumers matches partition count.

orchestration.name: Composer
orchestration.pde_snippet: Managed Apache Airflow. Define pipelines as DAGs in Python. "The Conductor" for BQ, Dataflow, and Dataproc. Complex logic.

details.trouble: DAG Import Errors: Check Airflow UI for Python syntax/module errors.

orchestration.name: Workflows
orchestration.pde_snippet: YAML-based orchestration. Lightweight, event-driven. Best for connecting Cloud Functions and APIs with low latency and state.

details.trouble: Expression errors: Check variable mapping in the YAML steps.

ml_ai.name: Vertex AI
ml_ai.pde_snippet: Unified platform for Pipelines, Feature Store, Model Registry. Supports AutoML (No-code) and Custom training (Heavy-code). GenAI Studio avail.
ml_ai.best_for: End-to-end ML lifecycle management, GenAI apps.

details.cost: Compute units + Model storage + API requests.
details.trouble: Pipeline Failures: Check individual component logs in the Vertex UI.

ml_ai.name: BigQuery ML
ml_ai.pde_snippet: Train models (Linear/Log Reg, XGBoost, K-means) directly using SQL. No data movement required. Lowers bar for analysts.

details.cost: BQ query cost (some models have premium rates).
details.trouble: Model convergence: Check evaluation metrics for poor fit.

ml_ai.name: Pre-trained APIs
ml_ai.pde_snippet: Vision (Image), Natural Language (Sentiment), Speech-to-Text, Translation. No ML expertise needed—just REST API calls.
ml_ai.best_for: Standard AI tasks without custom data.

details.trouble: Quota limit: Check Service Quotas if requests are failing.

governance.name: Dataplex
governance.pde_snippet: Data Mesh conductor. Manage data across silos. Data Quality (DQ) checks, discovery, and unified security policies. Data Catalog built-in.

details.trouble: Metadata staleness: Discovery scan frequency may be too low.

governance.name: Cloud DLP
governance.pde_snippet: Redact PII (Credit cards, SSNs). Built-in infoTypes. k-anonymity/l-diversity for de-identification. Mandatory for security questions.

details.trouble: False positives: Tune likelihood settings (e.g., LIKELY vs POSSIBLY).

governance.name: IAM
governance.pde_snippet: Principle of Least Privilege. Service Accounts for apps. Predefined vs Custom roles. Separation of Duties.

details.trouble: Inheritance: Lower level permissions can be overridden by higher level ones.

governance.name: Cloud KMS/HSM
governance.pde_snippet: CMEK (Customer Managed) vs CSEK (Customer Supplied). Cloud HSM for hardware security. Envelope encryption.

details.cost: Per active key version + cryptographic operations.
details.trouble: Key Rotation: Ensure app uses current key version for encryption.

governance.name: Secret Manager
governance.pde_snippet: Store sensitive data like API keys, passwords, and certificates. Versioned secrets with fine-grained IAM controls.

details.cost: Per active secret version + access requests.
details.trouble: Version Mismatch: App trying to access a deleted secret version.

governance.name: VPC-SC
governance.pde_snippet: Security perimeters around resources to prevent data exfiltration. Mitigates insider threats and compromised credentials.

details.cost: Free; requires VPC Service Controls setup.
details.trouble: Egress violations: Misconfigured perimeters block valid cross-project data movement.

operations.name: Monitoring
operations.pde_snippet: Stackdriver successor. Dashboards, Alerting, SLO/SLI tracking. Integrated with all data services.

details.trouble: Metric Lag: Some metrics are delayed depending on the source service.

operations.name: Logging
operations.pde_snippet: Centralized log storage. Sink logs to BigQuery for long-term analytical audit. Query logs for debugging pipelines.

details.cost: Ingestion volume. First 50GB/project is usually free.
details.trouble: Log volume: Filter logs at source to avoid high ingestion costs.

operations.name: Trace & Debug
operations.pde_snippet: Cloud Trace for finding bottlenecks in distributed apps. Cloud Debugger for inspecting code state in production without stopping app.

details.trouble: Missing Spans: Ensure application is correctly instrumented for Tracing.

operations.name: Cloud Build
operations.pde_snippet: CI/CD for data. Automate deployment of Dataflow templates or Dataproc jobs. Pipeline as code.

details.trouble: Timeout: Increase build timeout for large Docker image builds.

infrastructure.name: Cloud Functions
infrastructure.pde_snippet: Event-driven. Triggered by GCS file uploads or Pub/Sub. Best for lightweight ETL triggers and micro-processing.

details.trouble: Cold Start: First request after idle might have latency.

infrastructure.name: Cloud Run
infrastructure.pde_snippet: Run containers serverless. Scale to zero. Better than Functions for heavy processing with specific dependencies.

details.trouble: Container crash: Check logs for OOM (Out of Memory) errors.

infrastructure.name: VPC
infrastructure.pde_snippet: Private network for resources. Subnets, Firewall rules, and Routes. Private Google Access allows private VMs to reach Google APIs.

details.trouble: Connection Denied: Check Firewall rules and Routes.

infrastructure.name: Conn & VPN
infrastructure.pde_snippet: Cloud VPN for encrypted site-to-site over internet. Cloud Interconnect for physical private wire (10G/100G). Essential for heavy on-prem ingestion.

details.cost: VPN gateway per hour + Tunnel traffic. Interconnect is port charge + egress.
details.trouble: BGP Down: Check on-prem router config and BGP peer status.

infrastructure.name: Cloud NAT
infrastructure.pde_snippet: Allow private instances (Dataproc/GCE) to access internet for updates/SaaS without public IPs. Enhanced security.

details.trouble: IP Exhaustion: Ensure the IP pool is large enough for concurrent connections.

cases.title: Petabyte-scale Fintech Data Platform
cases.architecture: Transactions → Pub/Sub → Dataproc (Spark) → Cloud Storage → Looker
cases.pde_takeaway: Dataproc (Spark) for large-scale batch + Pub/Sub for real-time decoupling in fintech
cases.outcome: Revolut (65M+ customers, 1B+ monthly transactions) uses Pub/Sub to decouple real-time transaction ingestion, Dataproc for Spark-based batch analytics, and Looker for business intelligence. This architecture handles petabyte-scale financial data while maintaining compliance and performance.

cases.title: ML-Powered Search & Recommendations at Scale
cases.architecture: GCS/Dataproc → BigQuery → Dataflow → Vertex AI → Cloud Run
cases.pde_takeaway: Dataflow as the unified batch/stream bridge into Vertex AI feature pipelines
cases.outcome: Etsy (96M buyers, 9M sellers, $13B+ GMV) uses Dataflow for unified batch and streaming ETL into BigQuery, with Vertex AI powering personalized search and recommendations. Cloud Run serves model predictions at low latency.

cases.title: Real-time CDC & Data Mesh for Health Insurance
cases.architecture: Operational DBs → Datastream (CDC) → BigQuery → Dataplex → Vertex AI
cases.pde_takeaway: Datastream for serverless CDC replication + Dataplex for Data Mesh governance
cases.outcome: Sanitas (850K+ customers, Swiss health insurer) uses Datastream for real-time Change Data Capture from operational systems into BigQuery. Dataplex enforces unified data quality and governance policies across all data domains, with Vertex AI (Gemini) powering intelligent claims analysis.

cases.title: Financial Data Mesh with Dataplex
cases.architecture: Legacy Data Silos → BigQuery → Dataplex → Data Catalog
cases.pde_takeaway: Dataplex for unified discovery, lineage, and policy enforcement across BQ datasets
cases.outcome: NatWest Markets uses Dataplex to govern structured and unstructured financial data across BigQuery. Dataplex automates data discovery, enforces access policies, and tracks data lineage — enabling a Data Mesh model for debt financing and trading analytics.

cases.title: Global Ecommerce on Cloud Spanner
cases.architecture: Ecommerce Events → Cloud Spanner → GKE → Persistent Disk
cases.pde_takeaway: Cloud Spanner for globally consistent, horizontally scalable relational OLTP
cases.outcome: L.L.Bean migrated its online retail platform to Cloud Spanner to achieve global ACID consistency and horizontal scale. This eliminated the vertical scaling ceiling of traditional RDBMS during peak holiday traffic.

cases.title: Real-time Ad Serving with Bigtable
cases.architecture: Ad Events → GKE Autopilot → Bigtable → BigQuery → Vertex AI
cases.pde_takeaway: Bigtable for sub-10ms low-latency ad serving + BigQuery for analytical reporting
cases.outcome: Audiomob (20K+ advertisers, 15M daily users) uses Bigtable for ultra-low-latency storage of ad impression and engagement events in mobile games. GKE Autopilot provides the serverless container runtime, while BigQuery provides the analytical view for advertiser reporting.

cases.title: OTT Streaming Analytics Pipeline
cases.architecture: User Events → Pub/Sub → Dataflow → BigQuery → Vertex AI + GKE
cases.pde_takeaway: Pub/Sub + Dataflow streaming pipeline for real-time viewer analytics and recommendations
cases.outcome: Vidio (45M+ monthly active users, Indonesia's leading OTT platform) processes real-time viewer events via Pub/Sub and Dataflow into BigQuery. Vertex AI powers content recommendations, and GKE handles the microservices that serve live sports and drama streams.

cases.title: Modern Banking APIs with Pub/Sub & Dataflow
cases.architecture: Core Banking → Apigee → Pub/Sub → Dataflow → BigQuery
cases.pde_takeaway: Apigee for API gateway + Pub/Sub/Dataflow for event-driven banking data pipelines
cases.outcome: Macquarie Bank modernized its digital banking platform using Apigee as the API gateway, Pub/Sub for event-driven messaging between microservices, and Dataflow to process banking transactions into BigQuery for regulatory reporting and analytics.

cases.title: Government CDC Pipeline with Datastream
cases.architecture: Legacy Cloud SQL → Datastream (CDC) → BigQuery → Pub/Sub → Looker
cases.pde_takeaway: Datastream for CDC from Cloud SQL to BigQuery — enabling real-time government reporting
cases.outcome: ILDHS uses Datastream for real-time Change Data Capture from Cloud SQL into BigQuery, providing near-real-time operational dashboards via Looker for human services eligibility programs. Pub/Sub enables event-driven notifications across program systems.

cases.title: Healthcare Data Security with VPC-SC & CMEK
cases.architecture: EHR Data → Datastream → BigQuery → VPC-SC + CMEK + Cloud HSM + Security Command Center
cases.pde_takeaway: Defense-in-depth: VPC-SC perimeters + CMEK + Cloud HSM for HIPAA-regulated data
cases.outcome: apree health implements a defense-in-depth security architecture using VPC Service Controls to prevent data exfiltration, Customer Managed Encryption Keys (CMEK) with Cloud HSM for HIPAA compliance, and Security Command Center for threat detection across BigQuery and GKE workloads.
